title: GitBranches
description: The result of a read-only `git branch` inspection.

current.description: Current branch name, or `None` when detached/unborn or not in a repo.

GitBranchInfo.description: One branch in the local branch list.

checked_out_elsewhere.description: True when this branch is checked out in another worktree (and so cannot be checked out here without detaching it first).

upstream.description: Configured upstream for this branch, credentials redacted.

worktree_path.description: Absolute path of the worktree this branch is checked out in, when it is checked out in a *different* worktree than the current one.
